description: The result of a metric query, containing time-series data for each requested metric and dimension combination.

resolution.description: The resolution of the data points in the response. For example, 1h means each data point represents one hour of data.

nextPageKey.description: The cursor for the next page of results if the response is paginated. Null if all results are returned.

totalCount.description: The total number of data series in the result.

result.description: The list of metric series collections, one per metric key matched by the selector.

items.description: A collection of time-series data for a single metric key, containing one series per unique dimension combination.

metricId.description: The metric key for this collection, including any applied transformations.

data.description: The list of individual time series, one per unique combination of dimension values.

items.description: A single time series representing metric values for a specific combination of dimension values over a time range.

dimensionMap.description: A map of dimension names to their values for this specific series. For example, {"host": "web-01", "environment": "production"}.

dimensions.description: An ordered list of dimension values corresponding to the metric's dimension definitions.

timestamps.description: Unix timestamps in milliseconds for each data point in the series. Aligns one-to-one with the values array.

values.description: Metric values corresponding to each timestamp. A null value indicates no data was recorded for that time slot (gap in the data).

title: MetricData
